sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102122" key="ta/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τά</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, ὅ</foreign>, and <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὅς</foreign>. <sense n="II" id="n102122.0" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τίς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
